name: Shrimp and Chicken Brochette
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1.5-inch cubes
2 small red bell peppers, cut into 1.5-inch cubes
1 medium zucchini, halved lengthwise, then cut into 1.5-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine shrimp, chicken, peppers, and zucchini.
2. In a small bowl, blend mustard, apple juice, soy sauce, and garlic; reserve 1/3 cup of the mustard mixture.
3. Pour the remaining mustard mixture over the shrimp, chicken, pepper, and zucchini mixture; cover and marinate for at least 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Alternately thread shrimp, chicken, peppers, and zucchini onto 12 skewers that are 10 inches long.
5. Grill or broil the skewers until the shrimp and chicken are cooked through, about 8-10 minutes, brushing with marinade and turning occasionally.
6. Heat the reserved mustard mixture.
7. Arrange the skewers on a serving platter; drizzle with the heated mustard mixture.
